chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Musa Ibn Al-Qasim Al-Bajali

text: و ما كان فيه عن موسى بن القاسم البجليّ فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن الفضل بن عامر؛ و أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى‌ عن موسى بن القاسم البجليّ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Musa ibn Al-Qasim Al-Bajali has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Al-Fadl ibn 'Amir and Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from Musa ibn Al-Qasim Al-Bajali.
